MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jonas T. Pardillo, Judgment Debtor
No appearances made by Plantiff.

RULING: After hearing, PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is GRANTED, except for $50.00 per pay period.. The levying officer to return earnings to the judgment debtor. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
